Terror Server
Main Navigation GuideRuntimeOperationsDevelopment

Appearance

Terror ServerRoute Servers Without The Sprawl

A free, open-source, cross-platform gateway. Define domains, reverse proxies, and automatic TLS in one readable Runtime file.

Get Started
View on GitHub
Runtime
// Serve a backend app
app.example.com {
  proxy localhost:4000
}

// Serve static files
static.example.com {
  serve /var/www/html
}
⚡️

Reverse Proxy

Effortlessly route traffic to your backend applications using a simple, readable configuration.

🔒

Automatic TLS

Secure by default. Automatically provisions and manages SSL certificates for all your domains.

📁

Static File Server

High-performance static asset delivery with zero configuration overhead.

Zero Dependencies

Ready to route?

Install Terror globally in seconds and start proxying your apps.

<div class="install-block">
  <div class="install-icon">
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="4 17 10 11 4 5"></polyline><line x1="12" y1="19" x2="20" y2="19"></line></svg>
  </div>
  <code>curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devlopersabbir/terrorserver/main/install.sh | bash</code>
</div>
